failures.description: The agent misinterpreted or incompletely processed the catalog search output by omitting item 2299424241, whose price 237.48 is greater than $233.90.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for all available Mechanical Keyboards with RGB backlight costing more than $233.90. The ProductCatalogSearch result at index 3 returned five matching available RGB mechanical keyboards, two of which satisfy price > 233.90: item 1151293680 at 272.33 and item 2299424241 at 237.48. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer containing only item 1151293680, omitting item 2299424241 despite it being present in the tool output and satisfying the filter. This is a reasoning/filtering error over tool output, not a malformed tool call, unsupported intent, or missing user information.
